2025October 25, 2025

🇯🇵 Nagasaki, Japan

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Nagasaki, Japan, October 25, 2025 -- October 31, 2025

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2025-10-nagasaki-japan

18 Resolutions

1178Plenary
Establish a liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/WG 12 on 3D printing
In light of the shared interest in 3D printing, scanning addressed by ISO/IEC JTC 1/WG 12, and industrial data, particularly in terms of formats for visualization and other forms of product data ad...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1177Plenary
Launch ISO/NP 10303-63 for isogeometric analysis
SC4 requests its secretary launch a New Work Item for 10303-63 with an 8 weeks duration, due to the special nature of ISO 10303-63, SC 4 requests ISO to grant a waiver on the mandatory use of the I...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1176Plenary
Call for experts for Standards as Database team for ISO 23736
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to launch a call for experts to participate in the Standards as Database team for the Maintenance Agency on ISO 23736 part 3 and part 100 with gratitude to ISO C...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1175Plenary
Launch ISO 15926-2 edition 2 using SDT 36
SC4 requests its Committee Manager launch ISO 15926-2 edition 2 using the SDT 36 track and names Onno Paap as Project Leader and Jonathan Eyre as Editor for the project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1174Plenary

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1173Plenary
Initiate revision for ISO 10303-242 ed5

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1172Plenary
Launch ISO 10303-62 revision using SDT 24

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to Gernot Rossi and Hiroshi Murayma and for their leadership as Convenor and Deputy Convenor of WG 25 and wishes them the very best in their future endeavours.

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
